title: Fair Utils
description: Fair client-sided player utilities such as Damage Indicators and stuff.
body:
# Fair Utilities Mod

![fair utils logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6c772fa9e4593dc33dc1fc6701251ad812090a.png)
---

**Fair Utils** is a Minecraft **Fabric Mod** that adds in **_client-sided_** utility functions.

The following are the currently available and future-planned utility functions for the mod:
- Damage Indicators (Done)
- Task Tracker (WIP)
- Notepad (WIP)
- Calculator (Pending)
- Death Location Tracker (Pending)
- Waypoints (Pending)

If you'd like to suggest a new utility function module, feel free to open up a new issue or pull request at my repository.
